## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] perf
- [ ] test

## Issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 or Refs #123 -->

## Test plan

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] E2e tests added or updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run e2e` all pass locally

## Breaking change?

- [ ] Yes (explain below + add `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer to commit)
- [ ] No
